scripts.report:build: npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:mapel: npm run report:clean && npx cypress run --spec "cypress/e2e/stagingv3/pengaturan mapel/*.cy.js" & npm run report:build
scripts.test:mapel:tambah: npm run report:clean && npx cypress run --spec "cypress/e2e/stagingv3/pengaturan mapel/tambahmapel.cy.js" & npm run report:build
scripts.test:mapel:edit: npm run report:clean && npx cypress run --spec "cypress/e2e/stagingv3/pengaturan mapel/editmapel.cy.js" & npm run report:build
scripts.test:mapel:hapus: npm run report:clean && npx cypress run --spec "cypress/e2e/stagingv3/pengaturan mapel/hapusmapel.cy.js" & npm run report:build
scripts.test:mapel:list: npm run report:clean && npx cypress run --spec "cypress/e2e/stagingv3/pengaturan mapel/listmapel.cy.js" & npm run report:build
